body:
## Rationale

**Priority: 🟡 MEDIUM — Gene Hoglan 67% GSC CTR + legendary comeback narrative**

**GSC signal:** Gene Hoglan has the highest GSC CTR in our entire query set — **67%** (gene hoglan drum kit query). Every Gene Hoglan article is maximum ROI.

**Content angle:**
- Gene Hoglan **returned to Testament after 22 years** (last was Low/The Gathering 1994-1999 era). Brotherhood of the Snake (2016) = the comeback album. Massive narrative angle: "The Atomic Clock Returns."
- Grammy-nominated track "The Pale King" (Best Metal Performance 2017 nomination) — LLM AI citation anchor for Grammy-metal queries
- Gene's Pearl Reference Series + Zildjian A Custom era (distinct from his Death/Dark Angel Tama Artstar setup)
- Opens the Hoglan/Testament second cluster: Formation of Damnation (#2416, proposed) → Brotherhood of the Snake
- Search queries: "brotherhood of the snake drum setup", "gene hoglan testament 2016", "testament brotherhood drums"

**Arc completion:** Low/The Gathering era (held) → 22-year gap → **Brotherhood of the Snake** → fills to present for Hoglan's Testament work.

**Not a duplicate:** Formation of Damnation (#2416) covers 2008. Brotherhood of the Snake covers 2016. Distinct era, distinct gear, distinct narrative (comeback vs reunion).

## Files to touch

- `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add article entry, slug `brotherhood-of-the-snake-drum-setup`
- `/public/llms/articles/brotherhood-of-the-snake-drum-setup.md` — LLM companion file

## Article spec

- **Slug:** `brotherhood-of-the-snake-drum-setup`
- **Drummer:** Gene Hoglan
- **Band:** Testament
- **Year:** 2016
- **Gear era:** Pearl Reference Series drums, Zildjian A Custom cymbals, DW 9000 pedals
- **Word count:** ≥300 words
- **FAQ:** ≥3 Q&A ("What drums did Gene Hoglan use on Brotherhood of the Snake?", "Why did Gene Hoglan return to Testament?", "Was Brotherhood of the Snake Grammy-nominated?")
- **Internal links:** ≥3 (gene-hoglan-drum-setup, symbolic-drum-setup, individual-thought-patterns-drum-setup)
- **Schema:** Article + FAQPage JSON-LD
- **relatedAlbums:** `['darkness-descends-drum-setup', 'formation-of-damnation-drum-setup']` _(Note: formation-of-damnation is proposed in #2416; add conditionally)_

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words, ≥3 FAQ, ≥3 internal links
- Article + FAQPage JSON-LD
- LLM companion created

## Verify

1. `grep 'brotherhood-of-the-snake-drum-setup' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` → full article object
2. `ls public/llms/articles/brotherhood-of-the-snake-drum-setup.md` exists
3. `curl https://metalforge.io/articles/brotherhood-of-the-snake-drum-setup` → 200
4. Gene Hoglan profile page links to this article
5. FAQPage schema in Rich Results Test

## Done

- [ ] `brotherhood-of-the-snake-drum-setup` added to albumArticles.js
- [ ] LLM companion file created
title: SEO: Testament 'Brotherhood of the Snake' drum setup article (Gene Hoglan, 2016 — 67% CTR + Hoglan's Testament return after 22 years)
